clusters.justification: These terms broadly map to salience and medial temporal circuitry responsible for the overarching generation, processing, and experiencing of emotional valences and mood states.
This cluster reflects striato-cortical computations underlying reward appraisal, cost-benefit analysis, and motivation-driven decision making.
Anchored by default mode network activity, this axis represents the higher-order processing of internally generated constructs regarding selfhood, social agents, and interpersonal narratives.
